hotel_name: Four Seasons Resort The Nam Hai Hoi An Vietnam

reviews.title: Great resort depending on expectations
reviews.text: The resort is a fantastic resort with a great hard product and some welcoming staff. Rooms are large and clean and the F&B options are solid.
reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Villa king bed

reviews.title: A memorable experience
reviews.positives: Service was incredible

reviews.title: Comfy to stay
reviews.text: Little far from city ( Danang and Hoi an ), room and food were perfect!
reviews.room_type: Three Bedroom Ocean View Pool Villa king bed

reviews.title: 10/10 Experience! One of the best hotels in the world
reviews.positives: The property was just absolutely incredible. One of the best hotels in the world!!! We were worried about not staying in town, but that not a problem whatsoever. I feel like the pictures don’t really do the resort justice, especially the pool area. The pool was beautiful. We stayed in a 3 bedroom villa with a group of 6 of us, which also had a pool. We rotated between pool, beach, and villa pool. The value was phenomenal for what you get. I can’t speak highly enough about how great our butler Thuong was. He was so accommodating and predicted our every move and needs. But it wasn’t just the butler, the entire staff works like a well oiled machine. So much attention to detail. Just fabulous. Absolute 10/10 experience.
reviews.negatives: My only feedback for the resort would be around the dinner. There is a fabulous in room dining menu that would be nice to have a restaurant at night that has more of a menu like that. It was only the Vietnamese, Japanese, and Indian. They were very accommodating and let us order food of that menu to the dinner area so not really a big deal, just a suggestion to expand the dining option or menu.

reviews.title: Adult Resort
reviews.text: The beautiful scenery, landscapes, and sophisticated service are truly what you would expect from Four Seasons. The meals were also outstanding, with a breakfast buffet that included bubbles from the morning, and everything I tried, including Vietnamese cuisine, was delicious. The shuttle to Hoi An was convenient as well.
reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Ocean-view villa - Room Rate inclusive of breakfast for 2 adults

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The Japanese restaurant with Chef Alex was incredibly good.

reviews.title: Wonderful！！！！！！！！
reviews.text:
I was impressed by the meticulous service in everything. 
The sophisticated guest rooms. 
Even the bicycles were stylish. 
It was a blissful three days. 
I want to visit again soon!!
reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Ocean-view villa - Room Rate inclusive of breakfast for 2 adults

reviews.title: Fabulous beach get away.
reviews.positives: Nicest beach resort I’ve ever stayed at. Beautiful architecture, room, pool are and beach. Staff is so so helpful and nice. They make you feel right at home. Food is outstanding. Pure relaxation with great views.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Staying in a beachfront room.
The room, food, location, and staff service all provided an excellent experience!
Although my return flight was at midnight, they extended my checkout time by two hours, and after checking out, I was able to use the shuttle bus to explore the town of Hoi An. Upon returning, I was allowed to take a shower and have a meal, and I was able to make the most of my time without wasting any until leaving the hotel around 8 o'clock. It was a wonderful stay.
reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Beachfront View Villa king bed

reviews.title: Will be back!
reviews.positives: Spacious, clean and pure luxury

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel
reviews.text: Must stay if you go to Hoi An!
reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Villa king bed

reviews.title: Gran excelencia en la hospitalidad
reviews.positives: La tranquilidad,  la , la excellencia en el servicio, el hotel está muy bonito

reviews.title: Amazing place for honeymoon or anniversary
reviews.text: One of the most premium luxurious stays in we have been to. Extremely clean, great staff, good beach and great food
reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Ocean View Villa

reviews.title: Sans conteste un des meilleurs hôtels au Vietnam
reviews.positives: Tout : le grand luxe, le raffinement, la plage devant la villa, la qualité des petits déjeuners

reviews.title: Excellent stay and I highly recommend it!
reviews.text: Loved our stay - room was perfect, facilities were AMAZING (3 swimming pools -1 of them heated - a peel court, tennis courts, pickleball court, badminton court, basketball court, pool table, (broken table tennis table), cycles to get around the property, and a fantastic clean beach at the edge of your room. The restaurants could have been a tad better (very Asian skewed cuisine) but that said, the breakfast was TOP NOTCH! Probably the best hotel breakfast I’ve had. Didn’t have 2000 items, but it had select items each of which tasted exquisite. What I really appreictae is also the portion sizes (perfect for 1 person) so there is very little wastage. The spa was amazing, we had an amazing massage. Overall we came back feeling relaxed and rested and just had a wonderful time all around. Oh and the gym is amazing too! Fresh coconut water and protein bites to grab. Highly recommend this place - superb service and beautiful location, perfect service.
reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Ocean View Villa king bed

reviews.title: un séjour PARFAIT !
reviews.positives: Une expérience incroyable ! Cet hôtel fait parti des plus beaux hôtels que j'ai eu l'occasion de visiter ! la suite était parfaite, le service aussi, la piscine de nage ! géniale, les bars disponibles ...les vélos, la salle de sport,...le petit déjeuner ...et l'ambiance générale de cet hôtel avec des espaces extérieurs parfaitement entretenus ! un vrai petit village très très quali ! la navette à disposition pour aller au centre de Hoi An... bref tout y est ! Ne changez rien !!

reviews.title: Top Niveau, hervorragende Tage.
reviews.positives: Komplettpaket, Personal, Lage, Qualität.

reviews.title: Amazing experience
reviews.text: We chose Four Seasons as one of our honeymoon destinations, as it had always been a dream hotel of mine—and it exceeded all my expectations. From the warm welcome at the airport to the stunning hotel, the beautifully designed room (oh my, the interior!), and the exceptional restaurants, everything was truly one of a kind. Most of all, we were deeply impressed and moved by their next-level hospitality. Thank you, Four Seasons, for making our honeymoon so unforgettable. We can’t wait to return soon.
reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Ocean View Villa king bed

reviews.title: Freuen uns schon auf ein nächstes mal!
reviews.positives:
Wir wurden sofort wieder kommen, es hat alles was ein gutes 5 Sterne Resort haben sollte ,einfach Top .Sehr grosse Indochine Design Zimmer. üppige Gartenanlage, mega Spa gute Massagen.
Das essen ist gut ,das Personal sehr lieb und hilfsbereit. Super schöne Pool Anlage , toller Strand mit feinem Sand.
Gute Fahrräder im Resort und buggy`s wenn man nicht laufen möchte. Reinigung wird immer schnell und gut gemacht. Die nähe zu Hoi An ist auch toll und trotzdem ist es sehr ruhig im Resort. Sehr schöne Sonnenaufgänge es lohnt sich den Wecker zu stellen. Vielen Dank an das Personal und Management für die gute Betreuung!
reviews.negatives:
Das Japanische Restaurant hat nur Set Menus im Angebot und sehr teuer.
Das indische Restaurant war im Renovation .
Am Strand konnten wir nicht ins Wasser wegen Jelly Fish

reviews.title: Best anniversary experience
reviews.text:
From our check in through to their attention to detail, the Four Seasons is impeccable. 

We were surprised by a small cake, some flowers and a hand written card from guest services when they found out we were there to celebrate our 20th anniversary. 

Complimentary yoga classes to start the day followed by delicious spread of breakfast really sets us up for the day. 

Although it was quite windy and chilly we enjoyed the sauna and steam room along with their gym facilities. 

Turn down service daily with candles by the bath makes the evening really relaxing after an excursion or just to finish the day off. 

We will definitely be back!
reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Ocean View Villa king bed

reviews.title: Wer sich für dieses Ressort entscheidet, trifft eine sehr gute Wahl!
reviews.positives:
Großartig. Alles super sauber, toller Service des gesamten Personal. Sehr, sehr gutes Frühstück, sehr großes Angebot zum
Abendessen, egal ob auf dem Zimmer oder im Restaurant. Sehr schöner Spa-Bereich mit wunderbaren Anwendungen. Und Trang, die uns sehr persönlich betreut hat. Sehr liebenswert und unbezahlbar!

reviews.title: A resort that only I want to know about.
reviews.text: I was much more satisfied here than at the Intercontinental, in every way. When I travel next time, I might not go to the Intercontinental, but I feel like I will come back here to relax. The Korean chef personally came to our table to greet us, and without even saying which room we were in, they knew who we were the moment we got out of the car to check in and responded promptly. If you want to relax quietly, you should definitely come here.
reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Ocean View Villa king bed

reviews.title: Esperienza unica, la migliore fatta in assoluto.
reviews.positives: Semplicemente eccezionale, curata in ogni minimo particolare. Ville tipiche orientali . Disponibilità e gentilezza dello staff oltre ogni aspettativa. Attenzione a curare ogni aspetto e richiesta dei clienti. Ristorazione di livello altissimo. Posto sensazionale

reviews.title: Amazing days
reviews.text: We had amazing holidays in Four Seasons Resort The Nam Hai, with the best facilities, good sea food, silence and fresh air, all made us become full power, and we will very happy if we can come back here for the next time. (From our customers )
reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Beachfront View Villa

reviews.title: Buitengewoon fantastisch hotel en service
reviews.positives: Prachtige villa met aparte woonkamer en zwembad en butler service! Echt het beste van het beste ! Als je op en top 5 sterren service wilt dan vindt je het zeker hier ! We reizen veel en vaak naar 5 sterren hotels , maar dit stak er met kop en schouders boven uit !
reviews.negatives: Misschien juist de ligging . Buiten het hotel heb je een taxi nodig als je je wil verplaatsen, want in de directe omgeving is er niets te doen

reviews.title: This is the best resort.
reviews.text: The resort seems really luxurious and optimized for relaxation. The breakfast was delicious, and it was nice that the menu changed during our four-day stay. There was also a shuttle to Hoi An Old Town, making it easy to explore in the afternoon. All the staff were friendly, and I had a great experience with the service.
reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Hilltop Pool Villa King Bed

reviews.title: Schitterend
reviews.positives: Ontbijt was schitterend. Grote keuze van dranken, fruit en eten
reviews.negatives: Betaling met Mastercard. Pre-authorisatie is nodig en hadden ze beter onmiddellijk gemeld zodat de frustratie alsof de kaart niet werkte had  kunnen vermeden worden alsook de contactopname met Mastercard call center om uit te zoeken.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I think for $900 or more a night stay and for villas that beautiful the blinds need to be automatic. That way people laying in bed can enjoy the beautiful scenery just one click away. Other than that, everything else is perfect.

There is a Korean chef, so the Korean food is very tasty and the breakfast is delicious. If you ask, they will also recommend good restaurants in Hoi An.

Bust open your piggy bank and stay at this property regardless of what it does to your wallet. Worth every penny!

reviews.text:

reviews.title: Phenomenal stay at a beach resort
reviews.positives: One of the best hotels I have ever been. Service is outstanding! Food is delicious. The facilities are great.

reviews.title: 좋아요
reviews.text: 좋아요
reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Villa - Room Rate inclusive of breakfast for 2 adults

reviews.title: Incredible
reviews.positives:
Our stay was nothing short of incredible. From the moment we arrived, everything felt effortless and welcoming.
The villa was wonderfully spacious - so much so that we briefly considered extending our stay indefinitely and just moving in. 
What truly made the stay special, though, was the staff. Everyone we met was incredibly polite, warm, and genuinely helpful. Every request was handled with a smile, and nothing ever felt like too much trouble.
The facilities were fantastic as well. The gym, the tennis courts are great, the food Everything was very much up to Four Seasons standards - arguably even leading the pack.
Unfortunately, we had to shorten our stay due to the weather. That could have been stressful, but the staff went above and beyond to accommodate our change of plans, which we really appreciated.
The only downside is that we left feeling like we had only scratched the surface. There were so many things we didn’t get the chance to try yet.
We will definitely be back.

reviews.title: 씨뷰 1베드룸 빌라인데 다음엔 꼭 풀빌라로 예약할래요
reviews.text:
아이에대한 세심한 서비스 모두 좋았는데
예약할때 제가 착각을 해서 일반 빌라로 예약하는 바람에 ㅠㅠㅠ 픽드랍 서비스도 못받고 여러모로 아쉬웠어요 숙소 상태는 좋고  로비와 부대시설과 거리는 좀 있어도 버기가 바로바로 와서 편리하게 다녔습니다 조식도 퀄리티 좋고 한국인 쉐프님 인사해주셔서 넘 반가웠어요 한국어 가능 베트남 직원도 상주합니다

reviews.title: The Nam Hai unfolds like a dream on the edge of the sea—silk-smooth villas, whispering palms, and a horizon so serene it
reviews.positives:
The fact that it’s a Four Seasons property should tick all the right boxes - luxury, design, comfort, personalised service. But there is more - so much more…
The Nam Hai has always been special for me…the location, the setting, the ambience all colluding together to make this resort not just special, but memorable. Yet, it’s the staff, the service, the whispered personal attention to detail…that’s what makes the Nam Hai my favourite premium resort in the world (and I have been to a few). 
They have added restaurants since I was there last as well as upgrading their facilities and this simply compliments the high standards. Premium price but worth it for the more than premium, anticipatory attention and the superb staff members who never leave you in doubt that while you’re visiting the Nam Hai, you are Special (with a capital S).

reviews.title: 최고의 가족여행휴양지

reviews.text: Tôi hoàn toàn hài lòng với cảnh quan, dịch vụ và tiện nghi tại resort! Chỉ riêng chất lượng phục vụ ở nơi đây khiến tôi cảm thấy tuyệt vời nhất! Xin cảm ơn Four Season!

reviews.title: Nothing short of exceptional.
reviews.positives:
We don’t often write reviews, but our recent stay at the Four Seasons Hoi An was truly exceptional and worth sharing.
We stayed in villa 4290 with our little girl—arguably one of the best locations on the property, overlooking the beach—and from the moment we arrived, everything felt seamless. The villa and grounds were beautiful, but what truly set the experience apart was the people. Marco, Phung Tran, Toi, Thu, Hoa, Thao, and the gentleman in the white shirt—along with many others—welcomed us with genuine warmth and care that made us feel immediately at home.
Despite it being the start of the rainy season, the team brought nothing but sunshine to our stay. Service throughout was impeccable—attentive, thoughtful, and always a step ahead of what we needed. Every gesture, no matter how small, felt sincere and personal.
Our daughter especially adored mealtimes at Lan Sen. The staff went above and beyond to make her feel comfortable—chatting with her, playing with her, and even carrying her around the buffet with the kindest smiles. Watching that level of warmth and attention extended to her was deeply touching.
It’s those thoughtful details—the smiles, the anticipation of needs, the sense of genuine care—that left the strongest impression. Four Seasons Hoi An seems to have mastered the art of making every guest feel valued and understood.
This was, without a doubt, one of the most memorable hospitality experiences we’ve ever had, and we’re already looking forward to returning.
reviews.negatives: Nothing. We enjoyed every bit of our stay.

reviews.title: Best hotel
reviews.text: Everything was amazing!!!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We loved everything in our stay here, the staff were super responsive, welcoming and accommodating, we went for our honeymoon and they really elevated our experience and made it feel special. We are planning to go back there for our 5th year anniversary, the resort is superb and they are still finishing stuff so we are curious to see how it looks at the end.

reviews.title: 非常值得得推薦的高級度假村
reviews.text:
環境優美, 安靜, 體貼的服務, 還有十分乾淨的私人沙灘.  絕對可以讓人放鬆.
早餐選擇多樣性, 非常精緻美味,  這次住宿經驗超乎預期, 我想我會再回去.
reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Ocean View Villa king bed

reviews.title: It was a comfort and unforgettable staying.
reviews.positives: We stayed in Four Seasins The Nam Hai, Hoi An  to celerate our 30th anniversory. It was an unforgottable staying  because they provided lots of suprises to us. All the staffs are very nice and helpful. The Omakasa dinner in Nayuu is execellent and tasting. The breaskfast has various selections and specially to provide the Hoi An specialty and signature foods. eg Cao Lau Noodle. You must try it if you stay here because it is better and good taste than everywhere in Hoi An.

reviews.title: Truly a 5-star experience
reviews.text: My first time at this Four Seasons Hoi An resort, it was a wonderful experience from start to finish. The staff were friendly, welcoming and attentive to my needs. The room was spacious, clean and beautifully decorated with all the amenities and extra touches I needed to feel comfortable. What really stood out to me was the level of service I received throughout my stay and even during the peak period, it never felt crowded or busy or noisy. The staff were friendly and attentive always available to help and offer details and information. Overall, I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a luxurious, comfortable and unforgettable stay. It's truly a 5-star experience that exceeded all my expectations.
reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Villa king bed

reviews.title: Fantastic we will definitely come back
reviews.positives: The set up of the location is wonderful, it’s peaceful, tranquil and you have enough distance to other guests for privacy. The pools are some of the best we have experienced and the facilities include everything, fantastic gym, tennis courts, badminton court, basketball court, paddel court. We had a beachfront villa, that blew us away, the design is Japanese and well done, with great rustic colors, the view over the beach (also from the bed) was spectacular, we had a sunken bath in the room which was cool. The bathroom had a his and hers side and next to the in house shower there was an outdoor shower that was a convenient as the indoor one. Restaurants made great tasting food and the service overall was excellent. The team are super service oriented and have thought of anything you might need before you do and at the same time will never over do it.
reviews.negatives: It may get a but crowded for breakfast

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Faultless resort and exceptional service. Not cheap but most definitely worth every penny.
reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Pool Villa king bed

It’s The staff are very knowledgeable, pleasant and friendly. They treat their guests like family and will go to great extent to make you feel at home.  Will definitely return.

reviews.title: Good value with exceptional service always makes a stay at Four Seasons so exceptional!
reviews.positives: Villa is well appointed. Outdoor shower is refreshing ! Everything is immaculate. Lots of privacy and you can’t hear any noise at all. Breakfast & afternoon tea were awesome 🤩 Special thanks to Ms Bao who made us so very welcome 👍
reviews.negatives: My mattress was not very firm but check-out staff very quickly remedied it by adding “firm mattress” to my Stay Preference. Thank you!

reviews.title: One of the best experiences
reviews.positives: Luxury hotel with high standards . Our butler made us small surprises everyday because we celebrated our honeymoon. Very profesional staff but in the same time very kind and friendly. Spa is just amazing.
